note: Cross-repo stage handoff matrix for agents and the conductor. Source of truth for what each stage must receive and emit as structured variable groups (see CONTRACTS.md + pipeline.json). Agents must preserve required groups across the seam or fail-closed.

stages.failure_if_omitted: downstream stages infer brand core from prose; drift; L >= 1 on first contraction
build hallucinates IA/assets/motion; ship-battery cannot gate on real criteria; no cortex learning anchors
ops receives incomplete brand context; GTM ICP and distribution lose on-brand proof; no replayable artifact for homeostasis
portfolio C-suite and GTM operate on stale or incomplete brand; no learning loop back to taste/genesis

cortex.role_for_agents: embed/search anchor for on-brand references and deviation classification; write deviations with rationale for allostasis
